Trilogy And Wilson Benesch At Audio Show Deluxe 2026

March 14, 2026

TRILOGY AND WILSON BENESCH WITH WILSON BENESCH GREENWICH TURNTABLE PREMIERE AT AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026

British HiFi brands Trilogy and Wilson Benesch will partner for demonstrations at Audio Show Deluxe 2026, presenting a system built around Wilson Benesch loudspeakers and Trilogy electronics, plus a new analogue source from Wilson Benesch.

Wilson Benesch will use the show to debut the new Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable.

TRILOGY AND WILSON BENESCH AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026 SYSTEM

The system will feature the Wilson Benesch Resolution 3zero loudspeaker supported by multiple IGx Infrasonic Generators, designed to extend low-frequency performance and improve room integration.

Amplification will be provided by Trilogy with four 995 Reference monaural power amplifiers partnered with the 915R Reference preamplifier, forming the core of the playback system for the demonstrations.

The new Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable will be the source.

WILSON BENESCH GREENWICH TURNTABLE PREMIERE AT AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026

Wilson Benesch will use the event to give the first public preview of the Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable, the latest development in the company’s GMT® analogue platform. The Greenwich is positioned as the entry point into the GMT range, while retaining the same core drive architecture used across the company’s turntable designs.

At the show, the Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable will form the analogue source for the system and will be partnered with the HSE Masterline 7 phono preamplifier.

GMT PLATFORM BEHIND THE WILSON BENESCH GREENWICH TURNTABLE

The Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable is built around the company’s patent-pending OMEGA Direct Drive motor, controlled by ALPHA Drive electronics. Together these form the ALPHA–OMEGA drive architecture used across the GMT platform.

This engineering platform was first introduced with the GMT® One Turntable at Munich High End 2024. It was later developed further in the Prime Meridian Turntable, which expanded the design with additional structural and damping technologies while retaining the same core drive system.

With the Greenwich model, Wilson Benesch introduces a more accessible point into the GMT platform while maintaining the same fundamental motor and control architecture.

SYSTEM OPTIONS FOR THE WILSON BENESCH GREENWICH TURNTABLE

The Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable can be configured with several optional components, including the GRAVITON® Ti tonearm, TESSELLATE Ti cartridge, and the R1 Carbon Rack. An optional VTA Control System is also available for adjusting vertical tracking angle.

Together these components form a complete Greenwich analogue playback system built around the GMT platform.

TRILOGY AND WILSON BENESCH AT AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026

Throughout the weekend, visitors will be able to hear the system in operation and learn more about the GMT platform and the development of the Wilson Benesch Greenwich Turntable. Wilson Benesch will also host presentations covering the engineering behind the OMEGA Direct Drive architecture.

Trilogy and Wilson Benesch will be demonstrating their system in the Melbourne Suite at Audio Show Deluxe 2026.

AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026 INFO & TICKETS

Audio Show Deluxe returns for its fourth year in 2026, bringing together the UK’s most prestigious audio brands under one roof. From celebrated international names to specialist artisans, this is an event dedicated to the very best in high-end audio. Music lovers will have the chance to discover systems that redefine what true luxury listening can be.

Audio Show Deluxe takes place on the 21st March and 22nd March 2026
Location: Whittlebury Park Hotel, Whittlebury, Towcester NN12 8QH

Opening Times: The show will open on Saturday from 9.30 am to 6.00 pm. A live performance by King Brasstards will take place at 5:00 pm.

On Sunday, the show will run from 9.30 am to 5.00 pm. The live music performance will begin at 4.00 pm, featuring guitarist Antonio Forcione.

Visitors attending across the weekend will be able to experience both the full exhibitor line-up and the scheduled live performances as part of the Audio Show Deluxe programme.

Tickets can be booked in advance here
